GM:(0,0,0)  R:(-1/2,1/2,-1/2)  S:(-1/2,1/2,0)  T:(1,0,1/2)  Y:(1,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  M:(0,1,1/2)  Y:(0,1,0)  A:(0,0,1/2)
